g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage A — Requirements Engineering for the CBC platform')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage B — Use Case Modelling for the CBC platform')
g.text: Identify actors: learner, teacher, AI tutor, admin, MoES
Define use cases per actor · Draw UML use case diagrams
Output: Use case diagram + use case descriptions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage C — Domain Modelling for the CBC platform')
g.text: Identify domain objects: Learner, Subject, Competency, Post, AI session

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage D — Interaction and Behaviour modelling for the CBC platform')
g.text: Sequence diagrams for key flows (AI query, login, post, share)
Activity diagrams for processes · State diagrams for sessions
Output: UML sequence, activity, and state diagrams

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage E — Architectural Design for the CBC platform')
g.text: Define layers: presentation, application, AI, data
Component diagram · Deployment diagram · API contracts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage F — Database Design for the CBC platform')
g.text: ER diagram · Relational schema · Knowledge base schema (MCP)
Data flow diagrams · Storage strategy (online + offline sync)
Output: ERD + data dictionary + sync strategy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage G — UI/UX Design for the CBC platform learner experience')
g.text: Output: Wireframes + UI component library + learner flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage H — Architecture Validation and Review')
g.text: Traceability check · Risk analysis · Prototype feasibility · Handoff to build
